---
title: "Teaching"
---

I have served as a teaching assistant at the following institutions.

## Lappeenranta-Lahti University of Technology LUT

<div class="teach-item">
<strong>Behavioural Economics</strong> (Master) · 2023–2026 · Teaching Assistant
</div>

## University of Trento

<div class="teach-item">
<strong>Public Economics</strong> (Master) · 2025 · Teaching Assistant
</div>

<div class="teach-item">
<strong>Behavioural Economics</strong> (Master & PhD) · 2020–2025 · Teaching Assistant
</div>

<div class="teach-item">
<strong>Market Analysis</strong> (Undergraduate) · 2021–2022 · Teaching Assistant
</div>

<div class="teach-item">
<strong>Introduction to Economics</strong> (Undergraduate) · 2020–2021 · Teaching Assistant
</div>

## Guest Lectures

<div class="teach-item">
<strong>Behavioural Economics</strong>, University of Trento · 2020
</div>
